backend/main.mo: Main actor for the portfolio backend; manages artworks, user profiles, site images, media contacts, and admin authentication (password-based login, role assignment via AccessControl, password reset).
backend/migration.mo: Defines a migration function that transforms the old actor state (with ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH) into the new actor state shape (with adminPasswordHash and adminUsernames map).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the admin authentication flow feature to its relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing styling, hooks, components, and page-level behavior across the portfolio app.
frontend/index.css: Defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes (background, foreground, card, border, chart colors, sidebar) and applies base Tailwind styles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /admin-login, /admin), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider with 5-minute stale time, ThemeProvider (light), and a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Renders the About section with an artist portrait image, dynamic artist name and bio from backend text content, and a static stats grid with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkGallery.t: Displays a responsive artwork grid with hover overlays and a lightbox dialog; converts raw image byte arrays to object URLs and shows skeleton placeholders while loading.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with WhatsApp, Instagram, location, phone, and email cards, fetching contact details dynamically via the `useMediaContacts` hook and showing skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Displays a hardcoded list of five featured art projects by mapping over a static array and rendering each as a `ProjectSection` component with alternating image layouts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo (with a hidden 5-tap admin login redirect), quick navigation links, social icons, and contact info fetched from `useMediaContacts` and `useTextContent` hooks.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying the artist's name, tagline, stats, and a WhatsApp CTA button over a dynamic cover image, with skeleton loading states for all async data.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, active section highlighting, smooth-scroll links, a WhatsApp CTA, mobile menu, and a hidden 5-tap logo gesture to navigate to the admin login page.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: Reusable component that renders a single project card with an image and text panel in a two-column grid layout, supporting an optional reversed column order.
frontend/src/components/QRSection.tsx: Displays an Instagram QR code image and a follow button linking to the artist's Instagram profile, fetched via `useMediaContacts` with a skeleton loading state.
Renders a 6-card grid section listing artist services (murals, interior decoration, commercial spaces, etc.) with icons, numbered watermarks, and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Renders a 6-card grid section highlighting trust/differentiator points (quality, passion, timeliness, etc.) with icons and hover animations on a light background.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for reading and mutating backend data (artworks, logo, cover image, media contacts, admin login, etc.) via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: Custom hook that tracks which section ID is currently in view by comparing scroll position against section offsets, returning the active section ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a warm artisanal OKLCH color palette as CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/adminAuth.ts: Utility module for managing a client-side admin session in sessionStorage, including hardcoded credentials, session creation, validation, and clearing.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Renders the admin login page with username/password form, validates credentials via the backend actor's `loginWithPassword` method, creates a session on success, and redirects to the admin panel.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Full-featured admin dashboard for managing artworks, logo, cover image, artist portrait, and media contacts; guards access via session validation and uses React Query hooks for all backend operations.
frontend/src/pages/PortfolioPage.tsx: Assembles the public-facing portfolio page by composing all section components (Hero, About, Services, Gallery, Contact, etc.) with Navigation and Footer.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand colors (terracotta, gold, cream, charcoal), typography, border radii, and semantic CSS-variable-based tokens for the Khudrang Kalakaar project.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, existing features, known issues, and pending fix requests—specifically noting an unauthorized admin login bug at the backend that needs resolution.
